chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-611 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For orders on office objection For hearing of main case ---------------------------------------------- 22.10.2025 Ms. Wajiha Maryam Mehdi, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Agha Shahid Majeed Khan, advocate for respondent 2 and 3 Mr. Imran Khan, advocate for respondent No.4 ------------------------------------------ This petition was last fixed on 20.03.2024, which is about 1 1⁄2 years ago. Learned counsel for petitioner has failed to pursue this petition diligently in almost last 1 1⁄2 years. Today, learned counsel for petitioner is called absent, without intimation, despite his names appears in the cause list. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s), if any. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES J U D G E Gulsher/PS
